description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a build stage and a test stage. In the build stage add jobs: build-cfi-aarch64, build-cfi-ppc64-s390x, build-cfi-x86_64, build-legacy, build-libvhost-user, build-loongarch64, build-oss-fuzz, build-previous-qemu, build-some-softmmu, build-system-alpine, build-system-centos, build-system-debian, build-system-fedora, build-system-fedora-rust-nightly, build-system-flaky, build-system-opensuse, build-system-ubuntu, build-tcg-disabled, build-tci, build-tools-and-docs-debian, build-tricore-softmmu, build-user, build-user-hexagon, build-user-static, build-without-defaults. Each of these extends .native_build_job_template (or .base_job_template) and runs its specific script commands such as "mkdir build && cd build && ../configure ... && make -j\"$JOBS\" && make check-*", or for libvhost-user "mkdir subprojects/libvhost-user/build && cd subprojects/libvhost-user/build && meson && ninja", for oss-fuzz "mkdir build-oss-fuzz && export LSAN_OPTIONS=suppressions=scripts/oss-fuzz/lsan_suppressions.txt && CC=\"clang\" CXX=\"clang++\" CFLAGS=\"-fsanitize=address\" ./scripts/oss-fuzz/build.sh && export ASAN_OPTIONS=\"fast_unwind_on_malloc=0\" && failures=0 && for fuzzer in $(find ./build-oss-fuzz/DEST_DIR/ -executable -type f | grep -v slirp); do grep \"LLVMFuzzerTestOneInput\" ${fuzzer} > /dev/null 2>&1 || continue; echo Testing ${fuzzer} ... ; "${fuzzer}" -runs=1 -seed=1 || { echo \"FAILED:${fuzzer} exit code is $?\"; failures=$(($failures+1)); }; done && echo "Number of failures:" $failures && test $failures = 0", and for build-previous-qemu runs before_script git commands to fetch a previous QEMU tag, after_script moves the build directory, and archives it as an artifact with paths build-previous. All build jobs use the Docker image defined by $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/qemu/<distro>:<tag> (e.g., fedora, debian, centos9, alpine, opensuse-leap, ubuntu2204) and declare needs on the appropriate container jobs. In the test stage add jobs check-cfi-aarch64 and check-cfi-ppc64-s390x that extend .native_test_job_template, depend on the corresponding build artifacts, set IMAGE and MAKE_CHECK_ARGS variables, and execute the default test script. The hidden .migration-compat-common template is allowed to fail, extends .common_test_job_template, needs build-previous-qemu and build-system-opensuse, and runs migration-test commands with QTEST_QEMU_BINARY variables; no explicit caches or deployment targets are defined.
